description: You are working on the BookTrackerApp project located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/BookTrackerApp. The app currently creates its BookRepository manually in MainActivity. Your task is to refactor the project to use Hilt dependency injection (version 2.50) so that BookRepository is automatically injected. This involves configuring the project and app-level build.gradle files with the necessary Hilt and kapt plugins and dependencies, creating a @HiltAndroidApp Application class named 'BookTrackerApplication' in the 'com.example.booktracker' package, registering it in the AndroidManifest.xml, and updating MainActivity and BookRepository with the appropriate Hilt annotations (@AndroidEntryPoint and @Inject). Ensure the project compiles successfully using ./gradlew assembleDebug.
